edges.rationale: The source card establishes the planning, assignment, execution, exception, and closure loop.
The scenario exercises assignment, blocked partial execution, recovery, completion, and verification.
The deterministic fixture provides the people, block, observation, work order, and complete event history.
The screen renders the fixture's stable identity, blocker, partial acreage, repair, and verification evidence.
The registered screen uses the reusable work-order queue as its primary operational composition.
The packet fixes component semantics, permissions, data, interaction, copy, tests, and Figma mapping.
